- [ ] Unacceptable — Harmful misrepresentation (publish blocked)

## FORM 3: ACCESSIBILITY REVIEWER FEEDBACK

**Story Title:** ___________________________  
**Language(s):** [ ] EN  [ ] FR  [ ] ES  
**Reviewer Name:** ___________________________  
**Affiliation:** ___________________________  
**Review Date:** ___________________________

---

### SECTION A: WCAG 2.1 AA COMPLIANCE CHECKLIST

**1.2.1 — Audio-Only and Video-Only (Prerecorded):**
- [ ] PASS — Transcripts provided for audio content
- [ ] FAIL — Missing or incomplete transcripts

**1.2.2 — Captions (Prerecorded):**
- [ ] PASS — Accurate captions available
- [ ] FAIL — Missing or inaccurate captions
- [ ] N/A — Audio-only content

**1.4.3 — Contrast (Minimum):**
- [ ] PASS — Text meets 4.5:1 contrast ratio
- [ ] FAIL — Insufficient contrast

**1.4.5 — Images of Text:**
- [ ] PASS — No images of text (or alternative provided)
- [ ] FAIL — Images of text without alternatives

**2.1.1 — Keyboard:**
- [ ] PASS — All functionality accessible via keyboard
- [ ] FAIL — Keyboard traps or inaccessible controls

**2.4.7 — Focus Visible:**
- [ ] PASS — Focus indicator clearly visible
- [ ] FAIL — Focus indicator missing or unclear

**3.1.1 — Language of Page:**
- [ ] PASS — Language programmatically determined
- [ ] FAIL — Language not identified

**4.1.2 — Name, Role, Value:**
- [ ] PASS — All UI components have accessible names
- [ ] FAIL — Missing or incorrect ARIA labels

---

### SECTION B: TRANSCRIPT QUALITY

**Transcript Accuracy:**
- [ ] 95%+ accuracy (excellent)
- [ ] 90–94% accuracy (good)
- [ ] 85–89% accuracy (needs improvement)
- [ ] <85% accuracy (unacceptable)

**Specific Errors:**
_____________________________________________________________
_____________________________________________________________

**Speaker Identification:**
- [ ] Clear (if applicable)
- [ ] Unclear or missing

**Time Stamps:**
- [ ] Provided and accurate
- [ ] Missing or inaccurate
- [ ] Not required for this content

---

### SECTION C: READING LEVEL

**Flesch-Kincaid Grade Level:** _____
- [ ] Grade 8–10 (target range)
- [ ] Below Grade 8 (excellent)
- [ ] Grade 11–12 (acceptable)
- [ ] Above Grade 12 (needs simplification)

**Complex Terminology:**
- [ ] All cultural terms defined or explained
- [ ] Some terms need definition (list below)
- [ ] Many terms undefined (revise for clarity)

**Terms Needing Definition:**
_____________________________________________________________
_____________________________________________________________

---

_____________________________________________________________

## FORM 4: LANGUAGE & TRANSLATION REVIEWER FEEDBACK

**Story Title:** ___________________________  
**Source Language:** _____  
**Target Language:** _____  
**Reviewer Name:** ___________________________  
**Affiliation:** ___________________________  
**Review Date:** ___________________________

---

### SECTION A: TRANSLATION QUALITY

**Semantic Accuracy:**
- [ ] Excellent — Meaning fully preserved
- [ ] Good — Minor nuances lost
- [ ] Adequate — Understandable but imperfect
- [ ] Poor — Meaning significantly altered
- [ ] Unacceptable — Major errors

**Cultural Adaptation:**
- [ ] Excellent — Idioms and expressions localized appropriately
- [ ] Good — Mostly adapted
- [ ] Adequate — Some literal translations that feel awkward
- [ ] Poor — Heavy "translationese"
- [ ] Unacceptable — Culturally inappropriate

**Tone Consistency:**
- [ ] Matches source language tone
- [ ] Mostly consistent
- [ ] Some tonal drift
- [ ] Significant tonal differences

---

## SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS

### For Reviewers

1. Complete the appropriate form(s) for your expertise area
2. Be specific with locations (chapter, paragraph, timestamp)
3. Provide rationale for all required changes
4. Submit within review window (5–10 business days standard)
5. Email completed form to: [EMAIL]

### Compensation

- Forms will be processed within 5 business days
- Payment issued within net 30 days
- Rates: [See reviewer contract]

---

**Thank you for your expertise in ensuring cultural integrity, accuracy, and accessibility for SEEN by CREOVA.**

END REVIEWER FEEDBACK FORMS
